name: example-critique
title: Critique
description:
Run a 5-dimension expert design review on any HTML artifact in the
project — Philosophy / Visual hierarchy / Detail / Functionality /
Innovation, each scored 0–10. Outputs a single self-contained HTML
report with a radar chart, evidence-backed scores, and three lists:
Keep / Fix / Quick-wins. Use when the brief asks for a "design
review", "design critique", "5 维度评审", "design audit", or "what's
wrong with my design".

query.en: Run a 5-dimension critique on the magazine-web-ppt deck I just generated — score philosophy / hierarchy / detail / function / innovation, give me Keep / Fix / Quick-wins.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Run a 5-dimension critique on the magazine-web-ppt deck I just generated — score philosophy / hierarchy / detail / function / innovation, give me Keep / Fix / Quick-wins.
